references.english:
My soul is consumed with longing
for Your rules at all times.

Drink water from your own cistern,
Running water from your own well.

references.hebrew: לֹא־יַחֲרֹ֣ךְ רְמִיָּ֣ה צֵיד֑וֹ וְהוֹן־אָדָ֖ם יָקָ֣ר חָרֽוּץ׃
references.english:
A negligent person never has game to roast;
A diligent one has precious wealth.cA diligent one has precious wealth Meaning of Heb. uncertain.

references.hebrew: כִּ֤י אִ֥ם־בְּתוֹרַ֥ת יְהֹוָ֗ה חֶ֫פְצ֥וֹ וּֽבְתוֹרָת֥וֹ יֶהְגֶּ֗ה יוֹמָ֥ם וָלָֽיְלָה׃
references.english:
rather, this one delights in GOD’s teaching,
and studiesastudies Or “recites”; lit. “utters.” that teaching day and night.

commentary_links.hebrew: וְֽהָיָ֗ה כְּעֵץ֮ שָׁת֢וּל עַֽל־פַּלְגֵ֫י־מָ֥יִם אֲשֶׁ֤ר פִּרְי֨וֹ ׀ יִתֵּ֬ן בְּעִתּ֗וֹ וְעָלֵ֥הוּ לֹֽא־יִבּ֑וֹל וְכֹ֖ל אֲשֶׁר־יַעֲשֶׂ֣ה יַצְלִֽיחַ׃
commentary_links.english:
Such a one is like a tree planted beside streams of water,
which yields its fruit in season,
whose foliage never fades,
and whatever it produces thrives.bit produces thrives Or “he does prospers.”
commentary_links.matched_snippet: שתול על פלגי מים אמרי דבי רבי ינאי כעץ שתול ולא כעץ נטוע כל

commentary_links.hebrew: וַיֹּאמְר֞וּ הָ֣בָה ׀ נִבְנֶה־לָּ֣נוּ עִ֗יר וּמִגְדָּל֙ וְרֹאשׁ֣וֹ בַשָּׁמַ֔יִם וְנַֽעֲשֶׂה־לָּ֖נוּ שֵׁ֑ם פֶּן־נָפ֖וּץ עַל־פְּנֵ֥י כׇל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
commentary_links.english: And they said, “Come, let us build us a city, and a tower with its top in the sky, to make a name for ourselves; else we shall be scattered all over the world.”
commentary_links.matched_snippet: עיר ובדרך חטאים לא עמד שלא עמד

commentary_links.hebrew: וְאַנְשֵׁ֣י סְדֹ֔ם רָעִ֖ים וְחַטָּאִ֑ים לַיהֹוָ֖ה מְאֹֽד׃
commentary_links.english: Now the inhabitants of Sodom were very wicked sinners against G<small>OD</small>.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: סדם רעים וחטאים לה מאד &star ובמושב לצים

commentary_links.hebrew: אַ֥שְֽׁרֵי־הָאִ֗ישׁ אֲשֶׁ֤ר ׀ לֹ֥א הָלַךְ֮ בַּעֲצַ֢ת רְשָׁ֫עִ֥ים וּבְדֶ֣רֶךְ חַ֭טָּאִים לֹ֥א עָמָ֑ד וּבְמוֹשַׁ֥ב לֵ֝צִ֗ים לֹ֣א יָשָֽׁב׃
commentary_links.english:
Happy is the one who has not followed the counsel of the wicked,
or taken the path of sinners,
or joined the company of the insolent;
commentary_links.matched_snippet: עיר ובדרך חטאים לא עמד שלא עמד

commentary_links.hebrew: שָׁלְחָ֣ה נַעֲרֹתֶ֣יהָ תִקְרָ֑א עַל־גַּ֝פֵּ֗י מְרֹ֣מֵי קָֽרֶת׃
commentary_links.english:
She has sent out her maids to announce
On the heights of the town,

commentary_links.hebrew: וְֽ֭יָשְׁבָה לְפֶ֣תַח בֵּיתָ֑הּ עַל־כִּ֝סֵּ֗א מְרֹ֣מֵי קָֽרֶת׃
commentary_links.english:
She sits in the doorway of her house,
Or on a chair at the heights of the town,

She takes her stand at the topmost heights,
By the wayside, at the crossroads,

commentary_links.hebrew: ה֭וֹן מֵהֶ֣בֶל יִמְעָ֑ט וְקֹבֵ֖ץ עַל־יָ֣ד יַרְבֶּֽה׃
commentary_links.english:
Wealth may dwindle to less than nothing,
But one who gathers little by little increases it.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: ימעט וקבץ על יד ירבה אם עושה אדם תורתו חבילות חבילות

commentary_links.hebrew: לָ֭קַחַת מוּסַ֣ר הַשְׂכֵּ֑ל צֶ֥דֶק וּ֝מִשְׁפָּ֗ט וּמֵשָׁרִֽים׃
commentary_links.english:
For acquiring the discipline for success,
Righteousness, justice, and equity;

commentary_links.hebrew: וַֽיְהִי֙ (כי טוב) [כְּט֣וֹב] לִבָּ֔ם וַיֹּ֣אמְר֔וּ קִרְא֥וּ לְשִׁמְשׁ֖וֹן וִישַֽׂחֶק־לָ֑נוּ וַיִּקְרְא֨וּ לְשִׁמְשׁ֜וֹן מִבֵּ֣ית (האסירים) [הָאֲסוּרִ֗ים] וַיְצַחֵק֙ לִפְנֵיהֶ֔ם וַיַּעֲמִ֥ידוּ אוֹת֖וֹ בֵּ֥ין הָעַמּוּדִֽים׃
commentary_links.english: As their spirits rose, they said, “Call Samson here and let him dance for us.” Samson was fetched from the prison, and he danced for them. Then they put him between the pillars.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: ויאמרו קראו לשמשון וישחק לנו &star אשרי

commentary_links.hebrew: הַ֥לְלוּ־יָ֨הּ ׀ אַשְׁרֵי־אִ֭ישׁ יָרֵ֣א אֶת־יְהֹוָ֑ה בְּ֝מִצְוֺתָ֗יו חָפֵ֥ץ מְאֹֽד׃
commentary_links.english:
Hallelujah.
א Happy are those who fear GOD,
who are ardently devoted to God’s commandments.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: חפץ מאד אמר רבי אלעזר במצותיו ולא בשכר מצותיו

commentary_links.hebrew: כִּ֤י אִ֥ם־בְּתוֹרַ֥ת יְהֹוָ֗ה חֶ֫פְצ֥וֹ וּֽבְתוֹרָת֥וֹ יֶהְגֶּ֗ה יוֹמָ֥ם וָלָֽיְלָה׃
commentary_links.english:
rather, this one delights in GOD’s teaching,
and studiesastudies Or “recites”; lit. “utters.” that teaching day and night.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: ולבסוף נקראת על שמו שנאמר בתורת ה חפצו ובתורתו יהגה יומם
